failedAssertions.reason: Base (8453) returned no Curve quote for multiple tested pairs; curve_error was consistently 'This method exists only for L2 networks'.
Optimism (10) returned no Curve quote for multiple tested pairs; curve_error included 'This method exists only for L2 networks' and 'You must call getBestRouteAndOutput first'.
